verified_properties: R3 remote command list reaches package_rag_artifact in dry-run lifecycle
R3 package command includes --strict-r3 metadata in unit coverage
Live step_5_to_11 path verifies downloaded artifact with strict_r3=true and verify_import=true before returning success
Verification result is written to artifact_contract.json next to the downloaded artifact
Verification failure propagates as build failure so the cleanup/finally path can terminate the Pod
